commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
This PR updates direct production dependencies `@agentclientprotocol/sdk` to `^0.28.1` and `skillflag` to `^0.2.0`, with matching `pnpm-lock.yaml` changes.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR regression: the GitHub Test job on the PR head ran the repository coverage command and failed the named integration test. I did not run local tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A repair worker can attempt a narrow compatibility fix for the failing integration test on the dependency-bump branch.

target.title: chore(deps): bump the production group across 1 directory with 2 updates
target.body:
Bumps the production group with 2 updates in the / directory: [@agentclientprotocol/sdk](https://github.com/agentclientprotocol/typescript-sdk) and [skillflag](https://github.com/dutifuldev/skillflag). Updates `@agentclientprotocol/sdk` from 0.25.1 to 0.28.1
Release notes

Sourced from @​agentclientprotocol/sdk's releases.

v0.28.1

0.28.1 (2026-06-19)

Bug Fixes

  • Expose peer contexts from app connections (#190) (d657310)

v0.28.0

0.28.0 (2026-06-18)

Features

  • schema: Update to schema v1.14.0 (#185) (3c619a7)

v0.27.1

0.27.1 (2026-06-18)

Bug Fixes

  • node-adapter: Cap HTTP request body size (#186) (3832d4c)
  • node-adapter: harden Node adapter request parsing (220eae6)

v0.27.0

0.27.0 (2026-06-18)

This is a big release! We have rewritten the SDK to have a more ergonomic design for creating new agents and clients. You can read more in the Migration Guide for how to migrate.

For now, you will still have the old interfaces available to ease the migration, but they are deprecated and will be removed in a future release.

Features

  • Experimental Streamable HTTP & WebSocket Transport (#155) (d6a3d88)
  • New SDK design (see MIGRATION_0.26_0.27.md) (#181) (87e2df3)

v0.26.0

0.26.0 (2026-06-16)

Features

  • schema: Update to v1.13.7 of the schema (#179) (34885b6)
Changelog

Sourced from @​agentclientprotocol/sdk's changelog.

0.28.1 (2026-06-19)

Bug Fixes

  • Expose peer contexts from app connections (#190) (d657310)

0.28.0 (2026-06-18)

Features

  • schema: Update to schema v1.14.0 (#185) (3c619a7)

0.27.1 (2026-06-18)

Bug Fixes

  • node-adapter: Cap HTTP request body size (#186) (3832d4c)
  • node-adapter: harden Node adapter request parsing (220eae6)

0.27.0 (2026-06-18)

This is a big release! We have rewritten the SDK to have a more ergonomic design for creating new agents and clients. You can read more in the Migration Guide for how to migrate.

For now, you will still have the old interfaces available to ease the migration, but they are deprecated and will be removed in a future release.

Features

  • Experimental Streamable HTTP & WebSocket Transport (#155) (d6a3d88)
  • New SDK design (see MIGRATION_0.26_0.27.md) (#181) (87e2df3)

0.26.0 (2026-06-16)

Features

  • schema: Update to v1.13.7 of the schema (#179) (34885b6)
Commits
  • fe4fb03 chore(main): release 0.28.1 (#191)
  • d657310 fix: Expose peer contexts from app connections (#190)
  • 9d37e22 chore(main): release 0.28.0 (#189)
  • 3c619a7 feat(schema): Update to schema v1.14.0 (#185)
  • b1bf6dd chore(main): release 0.27.1 (#187)
  • 220eae6 fix(node-adapter): harden Node adapter request parsing
  • 3832d4c fix(node-adapter): Cap HTTP request body size (#186)
  • a3437f5 chore(main): release 0.27.0 (#182)
  • a3acfa2 chore: Cleanup documentation of ctx args and slim down public api (#184)
  • bd1f514 Update dev deps (#183)
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

Updates `skillflag` from 0.1.4 to 0.2.0
Release notes

Sourced from skillflag's releases.

Release 0.2.0

What's Changed

  • chore: upgrade release-it to v19 by @​dutifulbob in dutifuldev/skillflag#16
  • docs: add badges to README by @​dutifulbob in dutifuldev/skillflag#17
  • ci: rename checks.yaml to ci.yml by @​dutifulbob in dutifuldev/skillflag#18
  • feat: support portable producer skill roots by @​osolmaz in dutifuldev/skillflag#22

Full Changelog: https://github.com/dutifuldev/skillflag/compare/v0.1.4...v0.2.0

Commits
  • bf76d98 fix(release): use canonical skillflag repository metadata
  • a8891a8 feat: support portable producer skill roots
  • 9042409 ci: rename checks.yaml to ci.yml
  • edc8394 docs: fix CI badge workflow name
  • fa37800 docs: add npm/CI/license/node badges to README
  • e5dc43b chore: upgrade release-it to v19 (fix Octokit null log bug)
  • See full diff in compare view

Dependabot will resolve any conflicts with this PR as long as you don't alter it yourself. You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---
Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot show ignore conditions` will show all of the ignore conditions of the specified dependency - `@dependabot ignore major version` will close this group update PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for the specific dependency's major version (unless you unignore this specific dependency's major version or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore minor version` will close this group update PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for the specific dependency's minor version (unless you unignore this specific dependency's minor version or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore ` will close this group update PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for the specific dependency (unless you unignore this specific dependency or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot unignore ` will remove all of the ignore conditions of the specified dependency - `@dependabot unignore ` will remove the ignore condition of the specified dependency and ignore conditions
